name: Christmas Nightmare Faust [Limbus Company]
description:
Dante needs you to calm Faust down after her E.G.O. didn't fade away like normal.


On the 7th day of Christmas, LennyStan gave to me.
7 faust tentacles, 6 ryoshu burn marks, 5 dead pawnbrokers, 4 violins, 3 jade eyes, 2 r corp antlers, and a sancho in a pear tree

LennyStan’s 12 Days of Christmas!

1: Christmas Sancho

2: Christmas Rudolph (Genderbent)

3: Christmas Hong Lu (Genderbent)

4: Christmas Hindley (Genderbent)

5: Christmas Rodya

6: Christmas Ryoshu

7: Christmas Faust

8: Christmas Outis

9: Christmas Nightmare Ishmael

10: Christmas Nightmare Gregor (Genderbent)

11: Christmas Angelica

12: Christmas Binah

Art by @RmenSSARI
creator: LennyStan_2001
